title: Minimum Number of People to Teach
titleCn: 需要教语言的最少人数

testcases.input: n = 2, languages = [[1],[2],[1,2]], friendships = [[1,2],[1,3],[2,3]] Output: 1 Explanation: You can either teach user 1 the second language or user 2 the first language.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: You can either teach user 1 the second language or user 2 the first language.

testcases.input: n = 3, languages = [[2],[1,3],[1,2],[3]], friendships = [[1,4],[1,2],[3,4],[2,3]] Output: 2 Explanation: Teach the third language to users 1 and 3, yielding two users to teach.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: Teach the third language to users 1 and 3, yielding two users to teach.
